summary: Bug fix verified: Pet Soul Journey page now shows proper input types (date picker, dropdown options) instead of Yes/No/Sometimes fallback for all questions. Tested Date of Birth (date picker), Size (Small/Medium/Large/Giant options), Gender (Male/Female), and Flow Mode (Temperament options: Calm/Playful/Shy/Energetic/Protective).

features_verified.feature: Pet Soul Journey Page - Bug Fix
details: Page loads correctly with pet data (Mojo)
All Answers tab shows 8 expandable pillar sections
Identity & Temperament pillar expands to show questions
Date of Birth shows DATE PICKER input (not Yes/No/Sometimes) - BUG FIXED
Size shows proper dropdown: Small (under 10kg), Medium (10-25kg), Large (25-40kg), Giant (over 40kg) - BUG FIXED
Gender shows Male/Female options - BUG FIXED
Answer 26 Questions button visible in header
Opens Flow Mode modal with Question 1 of 27
Temperament question shows proper options: Calm, Playful, Shy, Energetic, Protective - BUG FIXED
Category badge shows 'Identity' for temperament question
Pillars: Feed, Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Travel, Care, Groom, Play, Train, Insure, Adopt, Farewell, Shop, Community
Each pillar has icon, name, path, and color gradient
Grid layout: 4 columns on mobile, 7 columns on desktop

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: All question inputs showed Yes/No/Sometimes options, even for Date of Birth, Size, Gender fields
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Question IDs from PetSoulAnswers.jsx didn't match QUESTION_OPTIONS keys in PetSoulJourneyPage.jsx
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added QUESTION_TYPES mapping (text, date, multiselect) and expanded QUESTION_OPTIONS to cover all question types

critical_code_review_comments: QUESTION_TYPES mapping correctly identifies text, date, and multiselect input types
QUESTION_OPTIONS covers 80+ question IDs with proper options
Edit Modal and Flow Mode Modal both use the same QUESTION_TYPES/QUESTION_OPTIONS logic
Fallback to text input for questions without predefined options (good UX)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet Soul Journey bug fix verified. Date picker, dropdown options, and Flow Mode all working correctly. The QUESTION_TYPES and QUESTION_OPTIONS mappings in PetSoulJourneyPage.jsx are the key to proper input rendering. MemberDashboard has 14 pillars defined correctly.
screenshots_taken: .screenshots/pet_soul_dob_modal.png - Date of Birth with DATE PICKER (bug fix verified)
.screenshots/pet_soul_size_options.png - Size with Small/Medium/Large/Giant options (bug fix verified)
.screenshots/pet_soul_flow_mode.png - Flow Mode with Temperament options (bug fix verified)
